M8/624, JUDGE W DOUGLASS, CSR R BARULICH, CLK H HAMILTON CASE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL, RONALD ARLAS FOR PLTF, DEFT MICHELLE ORREGO IN PROPRIA PERSONA. SETTLEMENT HAD, AS FOLLOWS: STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION OF 1231 GROVE ST. #10, PAYMENT OF $2960 RENT AND UD DAMAGES. $1395. TENDERED AS PARTIAL PAYMENT TO BE CREDITED. JDGMENT TO BE ENTERED, W/ EVICTION SCHEDULED ON 2-11-98. IF DEFT PAYS $1565. BY 0700 2-2-98 (CASHIER'S CHECK/MONEY ORDER), AND $1499.48 BY 2-6-98, PLAINTIFF'S WILL CANCEL EVICTION OF 2-11-98 & RESET FOR 3-4-98. $600 ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS OF $142.75 TO BE TAKEND FROM $2000. SECURITY DEPOSIT. IF DEFT FAILS TO PAY BY 2-2-98, PLAINTIFF CAN USE BALANCE OF SECURITY DEPOSIT TOWARD JUDGMENT. IF DEFT FAILS TO PAY ON 2-6-98, PLAINTIFF'S WILL RENDER ACCOUNTING OF SECURITY DEPOSIT. GENERAL RELEASE ENTERED PER 1542CC, PERSONAL PROPERTY TO BE DEALT WITH PER 1980CC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORREGO, MICHELLE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1231 GROVE ST. #10, S.F. $1,565.00 RENT, $600.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $142.75 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,307.75, STAYED UNTIL FEB-11-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT PAYS $1545. BY 0700 2-2-98 & PAYS $1499.48 BY 5PM 2- 6-98, THEN EVICTION S/E TO 3-4-98.ATTY'S FEES, COSTS, TO BE DEDUCTED FROM $2000 SEC DEP + $1565 IF DEFT FTPAY. DEFT IS SOLE OCCUPANT. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. PROPERTY LEFT DEE MED ABANDONED. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
